sentence: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon ninety (90) days prior written notice to the other party.
This Agreement may be terminated by either party upon sixty (60) days written notice.
Customer may terminate for any reason by providing thirty (30) days advance written notice to Supplier.
Notice of non-renewal must be provided at least sixty (60) days prior to the end of the then-current term.
Either party may terminate this Agreement without cause upon one hundred and twenty (120) days written notice.
A party wishing to terminate shall provide no less than ninety days prior written notice of termination.
To prevent automatic renewal, the non-renewing party must provide written notice at least forty-five (45) days before expiration.
Termination for convenience is permitted with thirty days advance written notice delivered to the other party.
If either party elects not to renew, it must deliver written notice of non-renewal no later than sixty days before the end of the term.
Either party may cancel this Agreement by providing the other party with ninety (90) days prior written notice.
Vendor shall provide Client no less than ninety days written notice prior to discontinuing any service.
The Agreement may be terminated by either party upon sixty (60) days written notice to the other party.
Either party may terminate by giving one hundred twenty (120) days prior written notice to the other party.
To terminate for convenience, the terminating party must give no fewer than 30 days written notice.
Written notice of termination must be delivered at least ninety (90) days before the intended termination date.
Either party may elect not to renew this Agreement by providing sixty days written notice prior to each renewal date.
The non-renewing party must provide at least 60 days notice before the expiration of any term.
Client may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to Service Provider.
Either party may terminate upon not less than ninety days written notice without further obligation.
This Agreement shall automatically renew unless either party delivers written notice of non-renewal at least sixty days before expiration.
Upon 90 days notice, either party may terminate this contract without penalty or further obligation.
Either party may terminate this Agreement by providing the other party with no less than thirty (30) days prior written notice.
Licensee may terminate this Agreement for any reason upon sixty days written notice to Licensor.
This Agreement shall continue until terminated by either party upon giving thirty (30) days written notice to the other.
The Agreement may be terminated by Client on ninety (90) days notice without cause.
Notice of termination must be sent in writing no fewer than sixty (60) days prior to the effective termination date.
To opt out of automatic renewal, written notice must be submitted at least 45 days before the renewal date.
The party intending to terminate must provide a minimum of 90 days prior written notice.
Either party may discontinue this Agreement with a minimum of sixty (60) calendar days advance written notice.
The Agreement shall terminate 30 days after written notice of termination is received by either party.
A notice period of not less than ninety days is required for termination by either party.
Either party may terminate the Agreement without cause on thirty days written notice.
The Company may terminate this Agreement at any time by providing Contractor with no fewer than 60 days written notice.
This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless either party gives thirty days notice of non-renewal.
Client may opt out of renewal by providing 60 days advance written notice prior to the expiration date.
If no notice of termination is given at least 90 days before the end of the current term, the Agreement shall automatically renew.
Either party shall have the right to terminate upon delivery of written notice of not less than forty-five (45) days.
Non-renewal notice must be provided in writing at least sixty days prior to expiration of the Agreement.
A minimum notice period of thirty (30) calendar days is required for any termination for convenience.
Either party may terminate for any reason upon providing the other party with ninety (90) days prior written notice.
The Agreement may be terminated by Service Provider upon thirty days notice if Customer breaches any material obligation.
Written notice of non-renewal must be provided no later than sixty (60) days before the expiration of the current Term.
Either party may cancel this contract at the end of any calendar year by giving the other party at least sixty days notice.
Termination notices must be provided at least ninety (90) days in advance of the desired termination date.
If Licensee elects not to renew, it must deliver a non-renewal notice at least thirty days before the end of the term.
The notice period for termination for cause is fifteen (15) days; for termination for convenience, it is sixty (60) days.
This Agreement shall continue unless terminated by one party providing the other with 60 days advance written notice.
Either party may terminate this Agreement at the expiration of any renewal term upon sixty days prior written notice.
A 90-day notice period applies to all terminations for convenience under this Agreement.
Either party may terminate on 30 days notice after the initial term without penalty.
Non-renewal of this Agreement requires written notice to be delivered at least ninety (90) days before the applicable renewal date.
To terminate without cause, the requesting party must provide the other party with at least sixty days written notice.
